title: buddleja albiflora var. giraldii
intro: Buddleja albiflora var. giraldii, also known as Butterfly Bush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. The medicinal properties of Buddleja albiflora var. giraldii include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Buddleja albiflora var. giraldii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
